attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT AS SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT , C.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ,
   NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD   , C.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ,
   CASE NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD                  
   WHEN 'REVENUE' THEN ( NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT  + NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT  ) 
   ELSE 0 
  END AS INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMOUNT , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP( 0 ) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
   USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER 
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_CSPP_VIP WGDD 
 ON NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = WGDD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT  
   AND NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD                  IN ( 'UNEARNED_REVENUE' , 'REVENUE' ) 
   AND WGDD.SOURCE_CODE IN ('VIP_ERP_ADJ', 'CSPP_ERP_ADJ','VIP_POS_ADJ', 'CSPP_POS_ADJ'
   ,'VIP_XAAS_ADJ', 'CSPP_XAAS_ADJ','CPI_ERP_ADJ','CPI_POS_ADJ','CPI_XAAS_ADJ')
   AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR
 WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME)
 IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES', 'CISCO SERVICE REBATES','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')  AND LANG = 'US')
     INNER JOIN 
   ( 
  SELECT NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT, NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY, BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   FROM  $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_CSPP_VIP WGDD ,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL, 
   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT GLCC 
   WHERE NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY        = GLCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
 AND  NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = WGDD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT  	
   AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR
 WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME)
 IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES', 'CISCO SERVICE REBATES','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')  AND LANG = 'US')
   GROUP BY 1,2,3 ) C
 ON NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = C.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT 
  AND NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY        = C.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER ( ) OVER ( PARTITION BY NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT ,
   NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD   ,C.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE               
  ORDER BY NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT , NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD  ,C.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ) = 1

SELECT
 DIST.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,DIST.SS_CODE
 ,CASE WHEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 WHEN NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 WHEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 ELSE -7777
 END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
 
 ,(CASE  WHEN (NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT          NULL) THEN  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 WHEN (NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT                  NULL) THEN  NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ELSE -7777
 END ) AS   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 
 ,(CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT       NULL THEN  NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 WHEN (NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  AND NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0) THEN NCA1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ELSE 73106
 END)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 
 ,( CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
 WHEN NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  THEN CAST((NCA1.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE 1.000000 END) AS SLS_COMM_PCT
 ,COALESCE(NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,NSOL1.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,DIST.SOURCE_CODE
 ,CASE WHEN NROL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = -999 THEN -9999 ELSE NROL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT END OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
 ,DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT
 ,DIST.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD
 FROM    $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_CSPP_VIP DIST
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 ON DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY = NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=DIST.SS_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (                                                             
        SELECT   SALES_ORDER_KEY,
          SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
          RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
          SS_CODE                                                            
        FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE    GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 ) NSOL
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NROL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NROL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV WHERE RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 AND SS_CD IN 'CG'
 AND (END_TV_DTM ) = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('Direct Sales','L')
GROUP BY 1,2,3 ) NCA 
ON  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
/*Part of Performance tuning jan 2023 CHG1488509*/
 
 LEFT JOIN (
SELECT RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV A ,
( SELECT DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_CSPP_VIP DIST GROUP BY 1 )B
WHERE B.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = A.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
AND A.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0
AND A.SS_CD IN 'CG'
AND (END_TV_DTM ) = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('Direct Sales','L')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4)NCA1
ON DIST.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
AND (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0 OR NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL)
 /*Part of Performance tuning jan 2023 CHG1488509*/
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT   SALES_ORDER_KEY,
          SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
          RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
        FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  where SS_CODE = 'CG'   
        GROUP BY 1,2,3) NSOL1 ON NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 /*Part of Performance tuning jan 2023 CHG1488509*/

WHERE DIST.SS_CODE IN ('CG')  /* ADDED AS PART OF CDC Q4FY18*/
 AND   DIST.SOURCE_CODE IN  ('VIP_ERP_ADJ', 'CSPP_ERP_ADJ','CPI_ERP_ADJ')
 AND DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY>0
 AND  DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT <0

SELECT DIST.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE , 
GDCR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS PL_CONVERSION_RATE, 
'TRANSACTIONAL' AS FUNCNL_TRXNL_CODE ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER 
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_CSPP_VIP DIST 
INNER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE            GDCR   ON GDCR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = TRIM(DIST.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE )
			AND (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
			WHERE /*PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG */ CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' ) = GDCR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE
			AND GDCR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  =  'USD'
			AND GDCR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'CORPORATE'        
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5

UNION 

SELECT DIST.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE , 
GDCR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS PL_CONVERSION_RATE, 
'FUNCTIONAL' AS FUNCNL_TRXNL_CODE ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER 
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_CSPP_VIP DIST 
INNER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE            GDCR   ON GDCR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = DIST.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE  
			AND (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
			WHERE /*PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG */ CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' ) = GDCR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE
			AND GDCR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  =  'USD'
			AND GDCR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'CORPORATE'        
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5

SELECT
 DIST.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,DIST.SS_CODE
 ,DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
 ,-7777 AS   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,Coalesce ( NCA.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , 73106  ) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,CASE WHEN NCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT IS NOT NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE  1.000000 END AS SLS_COMM_PCT
 ,'NULL' AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
 ,Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,DIST.SOURCE_CODE
 ,CASE WHEN NROL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = -999 THEN -9999 ELSE NROL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT END OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
 ,DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
 ,DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT
 ,DIST.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD
 FROM    $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_CSPP_VIP DIST
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 ON DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY = NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=DIST.SS_CODE
 LEFT JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_POS_SCA_ADJ_CNG_DRCT_NRT_TV NCA
 ON DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT =NCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 WHERE DIST.SS_CODE= 'CG'
 AND NCA.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 /*AND (COALESCE(NCA.SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG    ,'N') = 'N' OR  NCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y')commented above condn as per request from CSPP DEV Team */
 AND NCA.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG='N'
 AND   DIST.SOURCE_CODE IN  ('VIP_POS_ADJ', 'CSPP_POS_ADJ','CPI_POS_ADJ')
 AND  DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT >0

SELECT
 DIST.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,DIST.SS_CODE
 ,NROL.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 ,NROL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 ,COALESCE(NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,73106 )  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
 ,COALESCE(CAST((NCA.SPLIT_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)), 1.000000) AS SLS_COMM_PCT 
/* ,COALESCE(NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,NSOL1.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER */
  ,CASE WHEN NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
  ELSE NULL END AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,DIST.SOURCE_CODE
 ,CASE WHEN NROL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = -999 THEN -9999 ELSE NROL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT END OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
 ,DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT
 ,DIST.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD
 FROM    $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_CSPP_VIP DIST
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 ON DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY = NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NROL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NSOL.SS_CODE='OPL'
 --AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NROL.SALES_ORDER_KEY

	LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_NRT_BKG_BRIDGE BRD 
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BRD.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,BRD.WEB_ORDER_ID 
	ORDER BY BRD.ACTION_CD ASC,BRD.LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC)=1 ) BRDG_NONCM
    ON CAST(BRDG_NONCM.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT AS VARCHAR(30)) = NSOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM 
    AND BRDG_NONCM.WEB_ORDER_ID=NROL.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID	
    
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SLSCDT_ASGN_SLSTRX_NRT 
	WHERE BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'
    AND (EFFECTIVE_END_DTM) = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') NCA 
    ON  NCA.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = BRDG_NONCM.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
	AND DV_EFFECTIVE_END_DT = '3500-01-01'

WHERE DIST.SOURCE_CODE IN  ('VIP_XAAS_ADJ', 'CSPP_XAAS_ADJ','CPI_XAAS_ADJ')
 AND  DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY>0
 AND  DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT <0

SELECT
 DIST.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,DIST.SS_CODE
 ,NROL.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 ,NROL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 ,COALESCE ( NCA.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , 73106  ) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
 ,CASE WHEN NCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT IS NOT NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE  1.000000 END AS SLS_COMM_PCT 
 ,CASE WHEN NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
  ELSE NULL END AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,DIST.SOURCE_CODE
 ,CASE WHEN NROL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = -999 THEN -9999 ELSE NROL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT END OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
 ,DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT
 ,DIST.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD
 FROM    $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_CSPP_VIP DIST
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 ON DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY = NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NROL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NSOL.SS_CODE='OPL'  

 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=DIST.SS_CODE
 LEFT JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_POS_SCA_ADJ_CNG_DRCT_NRT_TV NCA
 ON DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT =NCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
  and NCA.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
  AND NCA.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG='N' 
 WHERE DIST.SS_CODE= 'CG'

AND  DIST.SOURCE_CODE IN  ('VIP_XAAS_ADJ', 'CSPP_XAAS_ADJ','CPI_XAAS_ADJ')
 AND  DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY>0
 AND  DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT >0
